why: F3 orphan-ref store carve of Op3 (#190) — revise of the behavioral node sdd/mission-graph: 11 ADDITIVE scenarios (store-home over the orphan ref refs/sdd/mission-graph via git plumbing + backend selection + migrate) appended under two new stages, over CONSTRUCTED temp git repos. Additive/self-clearing (gherkin-cli diff addOnly:true, 11 added / 0 modified / 0 removed) — .feature stays @frozen, no re-open. Design decisions settled (were ADR-0026 §Open F3-store-mechanics): git plumbing not a dedicated worktree (working tree stays clean); true orphan ref outside refs/heads (branch-independent via shared .git); pure fold/ready/cycles UNTOUCHED (seam-only swap of readEvents/appendEvent/appendEdgeChecked); backend selection env-override > (ref-exists OR git-worktree-and-no-in-tree-file) > in-tree, so an unmigrated v1 store is never silently orphaned; a migrate verb seeds the ref idempotently; compare-and-swap update-ref fails loud on a racing writer. Mechanism validated by a build-to-learn spike (branch-independence, clean tree, CAS-reject all proven). Cold sdd-spec-judge ALIGNED true (oracle/builder/architect PASS) on round 2 after a judge-iteration correction closed 3 builder coverage gaps + 1 architect observation. check-suite + check-spec-state green. Scope held to the F3 STORE only — headless-operator, lifecycle loop, and merge backstop paused into the plan brief (dependency root ships first). HIGH-blast HITL mission; leash auto-spec so the spec gate is self-asserted (by:agent) and the impl gate holds for human ratification via the legate relay.

Cold sdd-impl-judge IMPLEMENTATION_PASS: all 11 additive F3-store scenarios verified by independently re-derived oracle + node:test run (mutation-verified, none hollow) — orphan-ref persistence via git plumbing, branch-independence over shared .git, absent-ref-reads-empty, CAS-reject on a racing writer, idempotent migrate. Pure fold/ready/cycles UNTOUCHED; swap confined to the readEvents/appendEvent/appendEdgeChecked seam; backend selection env-override > (ref-exists OR git-worktree-and-no-in-tree-file) > in-tree so an unmigrated v1 store is never silently orphaned. Impl-judge round-1 caught a coexistence-precedence gap (test-only fix, no behavior change). Rebase onto target a no-op (0 behind); pnpm verify green (20/20). HIGH-blast HITL mission (leash auto-spec): impl gate HELD for human ratification via the legate verdict-packet relay; ratified by merge of PR #204 (Part of #190 — F3 store only, NOT Closes) into origin/main at 52e14110. Node sdd/mission-graph advances to implemented for this CR; the rest of Op3 (headless-operator, lifecycle loop, merge backstop, live-dispatch capstone) stays paused into the plan brief — each consumes the now-branch-independent F3 store; none blocked shipping it.

headless-operator carve of Op3 (#190) — additive revise of the behavioral node cyberfleet-plugin/operator: 8 ADDITIVE @behavior scenarios (new stage 'The lifecycle loop — unattended fleet dispatch (F3, headless)') specifying the Operator persona realized headless as the unattended fleet lifecycle-loop driver. Additive/self-clearing (git diff +59/-0, no @behavior modified or removed) — operator.feature stays @frozen, no re-open. Pod-boundary settled (design's Gap->F3 open item): headless-operator.spawn = inter-mission dispatch from outside any ship; Pod.spawn = intra-mission worktree fan-out from inside a ship; no rule of Pod or Operator changes. Dependencies confirmed present: mission-graph `ready` frontier + `append` single-writer path + `unit spawn`; v1 shape = lean agent def (plugins/cyberfleet/agents/headless-operator.md) carrying the loop inline, mirroring cyberlegion's headless-legate, deferring every mechanism to existing CLIs (no new engine). Cold aced-spec-validator ALIGNED true (oracle/builder/architect PASS) — invariants covered: single-writer, ready-pull, capacity/HITL gating, Operation-order retirement, inter-mission spawn boundary, tick-then-exit, headless-equivalence. Non-blocking observation: the frameless-relay branch has no dedicated scenario (future add-scenario). HIGH-blast HITL mission; leash auto-spec so the spec gate is self-asserted (by:agent) and the impl gate holds for human ratification.

Cold aced-impl-judge IMPLEMENTATION_PASS on the headless-operator carve: all 8 additive @behavior scenarios re-derived independently (ADR-0016) and verified by static inspection of plugins/cyberfleet/agents/headless-operator.md — headless-equivalence (runs Operator's out-of-ship dispatch, no live Council, no logic beyond Operator+mission-graph, batches up its relay), ready-pull (reads the mission-graph `ready` frontier, dispatches top rank), claim-before-spawn as single writer (status in-progress append then unit spawn), capacity K + human-availability gating (<=K, AFK->autonomous ship, HITL->human channel, overflow stays on frontier), single-writer (dispatched missions only report, never write the graph, so claims/retirements never race), Operation-order retirement (merge behind the backstop, tear down pod, append retirement+discovered, re-derive ready), inter-mission spawn boundary (distinct from Pod's intra-mission fan-out, no in-ship Pod rule invoked), summoned-ticks-exits (returns, not a daemon). No hollow passes; lean and faithful to the headless-legate pattern; manifest wiring (agents key) + operator persona pointer verified present. pnpm verify green (20/20); PR CI green (verify on both node versions). HIGH-blast HITL mission (leash auto-spec): impl gate HELD for human ratification and surfaced to the live in-session human (not the legate relay, no headless channel here); ratified by merge of PR #205 (Part of #190 — headless-operator only, NOT Closes) into origin/main at 848dfc3a. Node cyberfleet-plugin/operator advances to implemented for this carve. Non-blocking seam both judges flagged: the merge-backstop MECHANISM's home is implicit (this agent vs a cyberlegion verb) — that is todo 3 (merge backstop), next. Remaining Op3: merge backstop + live-dispatch capstone.

merge-backstop carve of Op3 (#190) — additive revise of the behavioral node cyberfleet-plugin/operator: 7 ADDITIVE @behavior scenarios (new stage 'The merge backstop — Operation-order retirement (F3)') specifying the Operator's merge discipline the headless-operator loads at its retire step. Additive/self-clearing (git diff +50/-0) — operator.feature stays @frozen, no re-open. Home settled by human choice: a cyberfleet GOVERNANCE (cyberfleet's first), plugins/cyberfleet/skills/merge-backstop-governance/, loaded by name by the headless-operator agent — mechanics deferred to gh/git/CI, NO new engine (matches cyberlegion's dispatch-governance partial-skill precedent). Discipline: retire in Operation order (consumer never before producer, Operation=retirement boundary); land only on green speculative CI on the MERGED result; bisect a red stacked batch to hold the culprit (single-writer graph append) and land the innocent; bound speculation depth by predictor confidence (commit near/speculate far); trunk always-green invariant load-bearing in its own section. Cold aced-spec-validator ALIGNED true (oracle/builder/architect PASS) — all invariants covered, mechanics-offloaded/discipline-in-governance split correct, single-writer respected. Non-blocking tidiness note: S2 tail restates the loop's re-derive (harmless). HIGH-blast HITL mission; leash auto-spec so the spec gate is self-asserted (by:agent) and the impl gate holds for human ratification.

Cold aced-impl-judge IMPLEMENTATION_PASS on the merge-backstop carve: all 7 additive @behavior scenarios re-derived independently (ADR-0016) and verified by static inspection of plugins/cyberfleet/skills/merge-backstop-governance/ + the headless-operator wiring — Operation-order retirement (consumer never before producer), land-only-on-green-speculative-CI-on-merged-result, red-never-lands (always-green by construction), bisect-red-batch (hold culprit as single-writer append / land innocent), confidence-bounded speculation depth, mechanics-offloaded (gh/git/CI, never re-implemented), agent-loads-governance-by-name. No hollow passes; governance lean and faithful to the dispatch-governance partial-skill pattern with the always-green invariant load-bearing in its own section; merge judgment cleanly carved out of the agent def. PR #207 CI green on a clean checkout (verify on both node versions) — confirming the local pnpm verify red was ONLY a concurrent session's unformatted mission-graph.mts WIP in the shared worktree, not this change. HIGH-blast HITL mission (leash auto-spec): impl gate HELD for human ratification and surfaced to the live in-session human; ratified by merge of PR #207 (Part of #190 — merge-backstop only, NOT Closes) into origin/main at ba0280d7. Node cyberfleet-plugin/operator advances to implemented for this carve. Remaining Op3: todo 4 ★ end-to-end live-dispatch capstone (the integration proof exercising F3 store + headless-operator + merge-backstop together).

Op3 (#190) capstone — dogfood acceptance recorded (design §Validation: a process check, not a frozen scenario). All four carves complete: F3 store (#204), headless-operator (#205), merge-backstop (#207), capstone. Proven live against this repo's own mission graph: (1) RECONCILE — retired 4 shipped-but-open missions (op1-m2 F3-store/#204, op2-m1 touch-set/#199, op3-m1 this-#190, op4-m1 F1/#206) via the single-writer append-node-status-retired path; `ready` then derived the TRUE remaining frontier {op2-m4 ssa-lowering, op5-m1 formation-barriers} — the kernel plans its own remaining work (dogfood bar met). (2) F3 EXERCISED LIVE — migrate seeded orphan ref refs/sdd/mission-graph (commit 8e5ff6c4, 38 lines) from the reconciled in-tree store, working tree stayed clean (git-plumbing append); `ready` from the orphan-ref backend == the in-tree view, frontier identical — branch-independence proven on the real store. (3) COMPOSE + SAFETY — over the reconciled frontier the loop composes (ready -> claim single-writer -> unit spawn -> retire via merge-backstop Operation-order/green-CI/always-green); because the frontier is ALL-HITL the loop's human-availability gate CORRECTLY DECLINES an unattended autonomous run (safety property: no auto-merge of HITL work with no human channel). A literal no-human live dispatch+merge was correctly NOT taken — it needs a genuine AFK mission + an authored brief + explicit authorization, tracked as future work. No new artifact, no gate — a demonstration recorded in the plan/ledger.
